Ironroot Shard

Category: resources Domain: material Subtype: resource

A dense mineral fragment prized by crafters for heat-resistant fittings and expedition gear reinforcements.

Ironroot Shard is harvested from ironroot veins exposed along cooled lava shelves near volcanic foothills.

Smiths describe a dull metallic sheen and exceptional resistance to thermal stress when worked into charms and tool heads.

Related

  • volcanic heat charm
  • cinder basalt flats
